title: StrictMode & double invocation
description: Why your effects fire twice — and why that's helpful.

questions.prompt: StrictMode double invokes in DEV to:
options: Expose impure render / missing cleanup bugs
questions.explanation: Production runs render once. Dev double-invocation is a diagnostic.

questions.prompt: How many times does console log in dev with StrictMode?
questions.explanation: Mount → unmount → mount again, logs twice in dev.
Effects should always clean up subscriptions.

options: You opt in with <StrictMode> in your app root
questions.explanation: Wrap the tree in <StrictMode> during development.
